raw:
```json
{
  "mission": "I will pass the CKAD Kubernetes certification exam in 2 weeks by mastering key concepts and practicing common scenarios.",
  "name": "Kubernetes Mastery Sprint",
  "topics": [
    {"path": "pod_concepts", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Understand Pods – their purpose, lifecycle, and how they relate to containers."},
    {"path": "deployment_management", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Deploy and manage Kubernetes deployments using declarative configuration."},
    {"path": "services_networking", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Learn about Kubernetes Services – types (ClusterIP, NodePort, LoadBalancer) and DNS."},
    {"path": "etcd_data_store", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Recall the role of etcd as Kubernetes' persistent data store."},
    {"path": "kubectl_command", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Practice essential kubectl commands for interacting with the cluster."},
    {"path": "scheduling_autoscaling", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Understand Pod Scheduling and Horizontal Pod Autoscaling mechanisms."}
  ],
  "phases": [
    {"topics": ["pod_concepts"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 5, "min_accuracy": 0.6}, "focus": "Foundational understanding of Kubernetes Pods."},
    {"topics": ["deployment_management"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 8, "min_accuracy": 0.7}, "focus": "Practical deployment strategy."},
    {"topics": ["services_networking", "kubectl_command"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 12, "min_accuracy": 0.8}, "focus": "Networking and Command Line Skills"},
    {"topics":["etcd_data_store","scheduling_autoscaling"], "criteria":{"min_attempts": 10,"min_accuracy":0.9},"focus":"Data Storage & Scalability"}

  ],
  "refinement_questions": ["Does the focus on kubectl command necessitate deeper exploration of YAML syntax?"]
}
```

errors: result: Value error, phase 1 references undeclared topic: a.b

```json
{
  "mission": "Learn hiragana characters to recognize and read basic Japanese words within 3 weeks.",
  "name": "Hiragana Launchpad",
  "topics": [
    {"path": "a.b.c", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Hiragana is the phonetic alphabet for Japanese, representing syllables."},
    {"path": "a.b.d", "kind": "recall", "summary": "The hiragana chart consists of 46 basic characters – each represents a sound."},
    {"path": "a.b.e", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Practice writing the first five hiragana characters (あ, い, う, え, お) repeatedly."},
    {"path": "a.b.f", "kind": "recall", "summary": "‘あ’ is pronounced ‘ah’ as in ‘apple’."},
    {"path": "a.b.g", "kind": "recall", "summary": "‘い’ is pronounced ‘ee’ as in ‘see’."},
    {"path": "a.b.h", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Match each hiragana character to its corresponding sound by reading aloud."},
    {"path": "a.b.i", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Japanese words are often built from combinations of hiragana syllables."},
    {"path": "a.b.j", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Identify simple Japanese words written using only the learned hiragana characters (e.g., ‘あめ’ - ame - rain)."},
	{"path": "a.b.k", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Japanese writing flows from top to bottom, right to left."},
    {"path": "a.b.l", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Trace the hiragana characters in a workbook or on paper – build muscle memory."},
    {"path": "a.b.m", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Vowels are key to pronunciation in Japanese"},
    {"path": "a.b.n", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Use flashcards featuring the hiragana characters and their associated sounds."},
	{"path": "a.b.o", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Japanese does not have a concept of 'vowels' as in English."},
    {"path": "a.b.p", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Listen to audio recordings of Japanese words and attempt to identify the hiragana characters."},
	{"path": "a.b.q", "kind": "recall", "summary": "‘う’ is pronounced ‘oo’ as in ‘blue’"},
	{"path": "a.b.r", "kind": "skill", "summary": "Combine the five initial hiragana to make simple phrases."},
    {"path": "a.b.s", "kind": "recall", "summary": "Practice recognizing and writing the characters in isolation first."}
  ],
  "phases": [
    {"topics": ["a.b.c"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 5, "min_accuracy": 0.6}, "focus": "Introduce the basics of hiragana."},
    {"topics": ["a.b.d", "a.b.e"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 7, "min_accuracy": 0.8}, "focus": "Start writing basic characters"},
    {"topics": ["a.b.f","a.b.g","a.b.h"], "criteria": {"min_attempts": 10, "min_accuracy": 0.9}, "focus": "Practice reading and writing the first few characters"}
  ],
  "refinement_questions": ["Does the learner prefer a visual or auditory approach to learning hiragana?"]
}
```
